use_cases: Display FAQ sections with expandable answers on documentation or support pages
Organize product feature comparisons in a space-efficient vertical layout
Create sectioned navigation menus for settings or configuration dashboards
Build knowledge base interfaces with categorized content sections
Implement step-by-step wizards or guided workflows with collapsible steps
ai_summary: A clean accordion component built with @ark-ui/react and animated with framer-motion, featuring smooth expand/collapse transitions with a rotating chevron indicator. The component uses AnimatePresence and motion for height/opacity animations, with subtle hover states on triggers. Suitable for FAQ sections, documentation navigation, and any UI requiring collapsible content organization.
